title: Summary
summary: This summary page reviews key system properties including causality (causal vs. noncausal systems), continuous-time vs. discrete-time systems, analog vs. digital systems, invertibility, and BIBO stability. It also introduces internal vs. external system descriptions, noting that external descriptions may sometimes fail to fully characterize uncontrollable or unobservable systems. The page concludes with a brief mention of state variable descriptions for Nth-order systems.
